programmes.show_description: (2018) Dystopian sci-fi adventure. In a future where disease has killed most children and given the surviving youths superpowers, fearful adults lock teenagers in prison camps...
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Four children compete in two crafty upcycling challenges working with textiles. Only two will make it through to the semi-finals of Crafty Champions.
Teleshopping.
(1958) Brooding western starring Joan Collins and Gregory Peck. A man hunts down the four escaped prisoners who he believes are responsible for the murder of his wife.
(1956) Western. Richard Widmark plays a man who murdered the killers of his wife and children and who becomes the unlikely saviour of a wagon train that's attacked by Apaches.
(1948) Historical adventure. A man (Louis Hayward) returns from the Wars of the Roses to learn from his uncle that a family friend has killed his father. But is everything as it seems?
(1941) Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara and Roddy McDowall star in John Ford's multi-Oscar-winning period drama set in the mining communities of the South Wales Valleys of the 19th century.
(2001) Thriller with Owen Wilson. A US Navy flight officer on a NATO reconnaissance mission has to fend for himself when he's shot down by Serb forces in the former Yugoslavia. Violence.
(2023) Tense, fact-based thriller starring Tom Hanks as the captain of cargo ship Maersk Alabama, which was hijacked by Somali pirates on 8 April 2009, directed by Paul Greengrass.
(2019) Soggy, snappy reptilian horror with Kaya Scodelario. A talented swimmer must use her water-based skills to evade a congregation of alligators during a flood.
(2017) Drama starring Ruth Wilson. Following the death of her father, a woman returns home to Yorkshire to claim the tenancy of the family farm she believes is rightfully hers.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1954) Classic 'cowboys and Indians' Western. Gary Cooper, Richard Widmark and Cameron Mitchell star as three rascals hired by Susan Hayward to rescue her husband from Apache territory.
(1966) Classic sci-fi adventure. Raquel Welch and Donald Pleasence are among the crew of a miniaturised submarine that's injected into an injured diplomat's body in a bid to save his life.
(1956) Sci-fi thriller. Hugh Marlowe stars as a scientist who discovers Earth is threatened by a fleet of flying saucers bent on global conquest. With special effects by Ray Harryhausen.
(1955) Romantic drama with Jane Wyman and Rock Hudson. A wealthy widow decides to restart her life. But her children and her social set disapprove of her lover, forcing her to rethink.
(1999) Hugh Grant and Julia Roberts star in the BAFTA-winning comedy romance about a bookshop owner who manages to get a glamorous movie star to go out with him. With Rhys Ifans.
(2018) Acclaimed drama with Jessie Buckley and Julie Walters. In Glasgow, a young woman, fresh out of prison, plans to go to Nashville and become a Country and Western star.
(2020) Action thriller starring Liam Neeson as a notorious bank robber. He wants to give it all up for love but is cheated by corrupt FBI agents. Can he clear his name and get the girl?
